product: Anthropic Claude Fable 5 now available as a Databricks-hosted model ​
tagline: June 9, 2026 Databricks Model Serving now supports Anthropic [Claude Fable 5](/aws/en/machine learning/foundation model apis/supported models claude fable 5) as a Databricks hosted model.
what_it_does: June 9, 2026 Databricks Model Serving now supports Anthropic [Claude Fable 5](/aws/en/machine learning/foundation model apis/supported models claude fable 5) as a Databricks hosted model. Claude Fable 5 is built for autonomous knowledge work and coding, designed to handle long running, complex, and asynchronous tasks with less need for human intervention.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
